title: salvia officinalis var. hispanorum
intro: Salvia officinalis var. hispanorum, also known as Spanish sage, is a variant of the common sage plant, characterized by its unique flavor and aroma. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Spanish sage include its ability to alleviate symptoms of menopause, improve cognitive function, and even help with weight loss. The herbal preparations of Spanish sage include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin to promote wound healing and skin health.
